user_prompt: The radium pistol requires a calibration
prayer:

Anoint the radium pistol's emitter coils with sacred rad-lubricant, preparing for calibration.
Initiate the calibration rite, beseeching the Machine Spirit of the radium pistol to align its lethal emanations.
Chant the Litany of True-Bearing as diagnostic runes confirm the radium pistol's precision restored.
Seal the calibration with oil of sanctity, honouring the Omnissiah's will.
